calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73318133 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73318133 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73318133 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files -uu | rg '(^|/)record/(context\\.json|documents\\.json|documents/|snapshots?/)|73318133' | sort | head -300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73318133/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/documents/documents.json; wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,1600p' data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/context.json","workdir":"

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"^(APPENDIX|REASONS FOR GRANTING|CONCLUSION|MEMORANDUM|ORDER|VETO|BACKGROUND|DISCUSSION|SUMMARY JUDGMENT|We affirm|AFFIRMED|The district court|The Ninth Circuit)\" data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i -C 4 \"district court|ninth circuit|standing|diversity|summary judgment|dismiss|affirm|subject.matter|federal question|jurisdiction|retaliat\" data/cases/scotus/73318133/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i -C 10 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|fee.class|originating circuit|Ninth|paid|2025 Term|2024 Term|2023 Term\" metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' metrics/statpack.md; rg -n 'salience|fee_class|paid|ifp|2025' metrics/statpack.json | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '3590,3705p' metrics/statpack.json; rg -n -i 'salience' metrics/statpack.json metrics/statpack.md || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help; UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts open-events --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search.*court|opinions|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition denied --limit 5 2>&1; UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition granted --limit 5 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"workable and useful evidentiary tool\" \"McDonnell Douglas\"", filed_before:"2026-07-18", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_id","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }
